zh.lifeSummary: 當Gauthier Walter VII BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN於大約1225年出生時，他的父親Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN41歲，母親Adeline d'ENGHIEN22歲。他於1238年12月18日與Marie d'Auvergne在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1288年6月23日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾沃林根享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gauthier Walter VII BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN于大约1225年出生时，他的父亲Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN41岁，母亲Adeline d'ENGHIEN22岁。他于1238年12月18日与Marie d'Auvergne在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1288年6月23日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾沃林根享年64岁。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gauthier

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gauthier Walter VII BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN was born about 1225, his father, Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN, was 41 and his mother, Adeline d'ENGHIEN, was 22. He married Marie d'Auvergne on 18 December 1238, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 June 1288, in Worringen, Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gauthier Walter VII BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN est né environ 1225, son père, Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Adeline d'ENGHIEN, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Marie d'Auvergne le 18 décembre 1238, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 juin 1288, à Worringen, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gauthier Walter VII BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN um 1225 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN 41 und seine Mutter Adeline d'ENGHIEN 22. Er hat am 18. Dezember 1238 in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien Marie d'Auvergne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. Juni 1288 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Worringen, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

Lui sposato Marie d'Auvergne il 18 dicembre 1238, nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Gauthier Walter VII BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELENが約1225年に生まれた時，父Walter VI Berthold de MECHELENは41歳，母Adeline d'ENGHIENは22歳であった。1238年12月18日にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンでMarie d'Auvergneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1288年6月23日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクoルンウオリンジェンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gauthier Walter VII BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN(이)가 대략 1225년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeline d'ENGHIEN(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1238년 12월 18일 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 Marie d'Auvergne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1288년 6월 23일 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 ko 워링에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier Walter VII BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN nasceu aproximadamente 1225, seu pai, Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Adeline d'ENGHIEN, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie d'Auvergne em 18 de dezembro de 1238, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de junho de 1288, em Worringen, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gauthier Walter VII BERTHOUT de MALINES de MECHELEN родился около 1225 г., его отцу по имени Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Adeline d'ENGHIEN, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie d'Auvergne 18 декабря 1238 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 июня 1288 г. в местности ворринген, кoлн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 64 лет.

Se casó con Marie d'Auvergne el 18 de diciembre de 1238, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de junio de 1288, en Worringen, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 64 años.
